title: Separate Enchantment Books
description: Navigate through piles of books at a glance with color coded enchantment books.
body:
# What does it do

Separate Enchantment Books (SEB for short) is a texture pack that uses colors and icons to make every enchantment book different.

<details>
<summary>Color Codes</summary>
  
![Red book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oTZlnRgk/images/5b30e03a05eb1a8d80d6e382150d2759d4f05476.png)

Red - Enchants for ranged weapons: Bow and crossbow

![Orange book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oTZlnRgk/images/617b849e63a3eed217516f7e7aa7722d8fb26eb4.png)

Orange - Curses

![Yellow book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oTZlnRgk/images/2a6839dae39d1ef418082a6845e286412178952e.png)

Yellow - Enchants related to combat

![Green book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oTZlnRgk/images/f31785a95e80b4b7340c2ca33bcb83b1bcd8731c.png)

Green - Armor enchantments

![Blue book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oTZlnRgk/images/142721e876a1f2c2dbed7890b64101d65aeeb124.png)

Blue - Enchantments related to water

![Purple Book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oTZlnRgk/images/8e8b5329f861d55a23df2230a49b7ac9374f7c1e.png)

Purple - Utility books\
Other - Some books don't have a color assigned because a block or an item will portray the enchant better :)

</details>

## Requirements
This pack requires [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) or [Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/home)

## Contribute
Feel like something is missing?\
Think that something could be better?\
You can chat with me on discord and help me improve the pack!
